title: Summary of Input from Stakeholders and other institutions involved in dynamic force applications
author: Tegtmeier Falk

description: Survey data used to create Deliverable 1 of ComTraForce project "Roadmap detailing the future requirements for improved force transfer standards and associated calibration methods for force testing machines taking into account realistic uncertainties".
